title: Restaurant Management Reimagined
subtitle: Optimize your bookings, coordinate your team, and deliver an exceptional guest experience with Tablely.
heroPill: Tablely: The all-in-one platform for modern restaurateurs
featuresHeading: Everything you need to run your establishment
featuresSubtitle: A powerful suite of tools designed to simplify your daily operations and boost profitability.
feature1Description: A seamless booking engine for your guests, integrated directly with your floor plan.
feature2Description: Visualize your dining room in real-time and manage arrivals with surgical precision.
feature3Description: Assign tables and communicate effectively with your staff during peak hours.
feature4Description: Secure your revenue with credit card hold and automatic confirmations.
blogSubtitle: News and updates about the platform
documentationSubtitle: Tutorials and guide to get started with the platform
faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know to get started with Tablely.
faqQ1: How do I integrate Tablely into my website?
faqA1: Tablely provides a simple script to copy-paste onto your site or a link to add to your social media bio.
faqA2: Yes, our Enterprise plan is specifically designed for restaurant groups.
faqA3: Absolutely. You can enable credit card holds to secure your most important reservations.
faqA4: Yes, Tablely includes a dynamic editor to faithfully recreate your dining room and tables.
faqQ5: What happens if the internet goes down?
faqA5: Tablely allows offline consultation and automatically synchronizes once the connection is restored.
faqQ6: Do you take commissions on covers?
faqA6: No, Tablely works on a fixed subscription basis. No commission is taken on your bookings.
contactFaq: Have a question? Our team is here to help.
termsOfServiceContent: Our terms and conditions. By using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms. These terms govern your access to and use of our services. Please read them carefully.
termsOfServicePresentationContent: The Tablely platform (hereinafter referred to as 'the Platform') is a service for connecting customers wishing to book a table (hereinafter referred to as 'the Customers') and restaurant establishments (hereinafter referred to as 'the Restaurateurs').
termsOfServiceAccessInscriptionContent: Access to the Platform is free for Customers. Registration requires the creation of an account via an email and password (managed via Supabase Auth). The user undertakes to provide accurate information and to maintain the confidentiality of their credentials.
termsOfServiceReservationServiceContent: Automatic Confirmation: Tablely allows a reservation to be made in real-time based on the inventory declared by the Restaurateur. Once the reservation is validated, the Customer receives a confirmation by email.
Customer Engagement: The Customer undertakes to arrive at the scheduled time. In case of an obstacle, the Customer must cancel their reservation via the platform as soon as possible.
termsOfServiceNoShowPaymentContent: Banking Fingerprint: For certain establishments or groups, Tablely may require a banking fingerprint via its partner Stripe.
Cancellation Fees: The Restaurateur reserves the right to charge cancellation fees for no-shows if the specific cancellation conditions of the establishment are not met.
termsOfServiceResponsibilitiesContent: Of Tablely: The Platform acts as a technical intermediary. It cannot be held liable for the quality of the restaurant service, a refusal of welcome by the Restaurateur, or errors in manual inventory.
Of the restaurateur: The Restaurateur is solely responsible for updating their seat plan and honoring confirmed reservations.
termsOfServiceRGPDContent: Compliance with the RGPD: Tablely complies with the RGPD (General Data Protection Regulation) and ensures the protection of your personal data.
Your data is never resold to third parties.
The Restaurateur has access only to the data necessary to manage your reservation.
You have the right to access, rectify and delete your data.
termsOfServiceIPContent: All elements of the Platform (logos, interfaces, algorithms of placement) are the exclusive property of Tablely. Any reproduction is strictly prohibited.
termsOfServiceModificationTitle: 8. Modification of the terms of use
termsOfServiceModificationContent: Tablely reserves the right to modify the present CGU at any time. Users will be informed of any major modification by email or through a notification on the platform.
cookiePolicyDescription: Our cookie policy and how we use them
cookiePolicyWhatIsACookieContent: A cookie is a small text file deposited on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when you visit a website. It allows us to recognize the user during their next visits and to improve their experience.
cookiePolicyWhyDoWeUseCookiesContent: We use three categories of cookies on Tablely
cookiePolicyNecessaryList: Authentication (Supabase) : Allow you to stay logged into your account while browsing
Security : Allow you to protect your account and our servers against attacks
Session : Essential for the proper functioning of the reservation tunnel
cookiePolicyFunctionalityList: Used to secure and process payments or banking fingerprints. They are necessary to ensure the reliability of transactions.
cookiePolicyAnalyticsList: Allow us to understand how users navigate the site in order to optimize ergonomics (ex: most visited pages). This data is generally anonymized.
cookiePolicyChoiceContent: On your first visit, a banner informs you of the presence of cookies.
Technical Cookies : They cannot be deactivated because the site could not function without them (ex: staying logged in).
Third-party cookies : You can configure your browser to block third-party cookies or be alerted when a cookie is sent.
cookiePolicyParametrageNavigateurContent: Each browser offers different settings for managing cookies :
Chrome : Menu > Settings > Privacy and security.
Firefox : Menu > Tools > Options > Privacy & Security.
Edge : Menu > Settings > Privacy, search, and services.
cookiePolicyContactContent: If you have any questions about our cookie policy, please do not hesitate to contact us at the following address: {{email}}
privacyPolicyDescription: Our privacy policy and how we use your data
privacyPolicyResponsibilityDataTreatment: The Tablely platform is responsible for the processing of personal data collected via the site. We are committed to protecting the privacy of our users (Customers and Restaurateurs).
privacyPolicyDataCollectedContent: We only collect the strictly necessary information:
For Customers: Name, first name, email address, phone number and reservation history.
For Restaurateurs: Professional information, establishment address, floor plan and billing data.
Payment Data: Bank card information is processed exclusively by Stripe. Tablely never has access to your card numbers.
privacyPolicyTreatmentPurposeContent: Manage and confirm your reservations in real time.
Allow restaurateurs to identify you upon your arrival.
Fight against fraud and abusive reservations (no-shows).
privacyPolicyShareDataContent: Your personal data is only shared with third parties essential to the service:
The Restaurateur: Receives your name/first name/phone number to prepare your welcome.
Supabase: For secure database hosting and authentication.
Stripe: For secure transaction and banking fingerprint management.
Vercel: For audience analysis and site performance monitoring (Vercel Analytics & Speed Insights).
No data is sold or shared for commercial purposes.
Your data is stored securely on Supabase servers (EU).
privacyPolicyDataRetentionContent: Data is kept as long as your account is active. In case of prolonged inactivity (2 years), your personal data is anonymized or deleted, unless there is a legal obligation to retain it.
privacyPolicyUserRightsContent: In accordance with the RGPD, you have the following rights:
Right of access: Obtain a copy of your data.
Right to erasure: Request the deletion of your data.
Right to object: Object to the processing of your data.
To exercise these rights, please contact us at the following address: {{email}}
privacyPolicySecurityContent: We implement all appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of your personal data and prevent any loss, alteration or unauthorized access.

footerDescription: Tablely helps restaurateurs take back control of their establishment with intuitive and powerful technology.
dualExperienceSubtitle: Tablely has been meticulously designed to meet the radically different needs of both guests and professionals.
clientExperienceDescription: A clean, soothing interface for friction-less table booking. Warm copper tones that invite gastronomic delight.
proExperienceDescription: A high-performance 'slate' dashboard for total service control. Dense, technical, and focused on operational efficiency.
